name: private-website
description: Monorepo dev orchestration (book-mall, tool-web, finance-web, story-web)

scripts.dev:all:
node -e "console.log('
  >>> 开发导航: http://localhost:3000/dev
  >>> KIE 任务: http://localhost:3000/dev/story/tasks
')" && concurrently -k -n mall,tool,finance,story,poll -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "pnpm --dir book-mall dev" "pnpm --dir tool-web dev" "pnpm --dir finance-web dev" "pnpm --dir story-web dev" "pnpm --dir book-mall story:poll-loop"
scripts.dev:all:nopoll:
node -e "console.log('
  >>> 开发导航: http://localhost:3000/dev
  >>> 注意：未启动 story:poll-loop，漫剧任务会一直停留在生成中。
')" && concurrently -k -n mall,tool,finance,story -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm --dir book-mall dev" "pnpm --dir tool-web dev" "pnpm --dir finance-web dev" "pnpm --dir story-web dev"
